reference: I am twenty-seven years old and I have a condition referred to as gynecomastia, commonly known as man-boobs. I am a research student. I am extremely depressed, and because of this, I am unable to focus on my research, which greatly affects my normal social and personal life. I need urgent medical advice to fully resolve this issue. I have been experiencing this for the past five to six years.
text: I am twenty-seven years old and I have a condition referred to as gonokamastia, commonly known as man boobs. I am a research student. I am extremely depressed, and because of this, I am unable to focus on my research, which greatly affects my normal social and personal life. I need urgent medical advice to fully resolve this issue. I have been experienced for the past five to six years.
